mapper.select: SELECT S.ID, S.TITLE, S.STARTS_AT AS startsAt, S.LOCATION, S.TOPIC, S.TYPE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SESSION_APPLICATIONS A WHERE A.SESSION_ID = S.ID and a.status = 'CONFIRMED' ) AS attendanceCount, S.CAPACITY, S.STATUS, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, S.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, S.HOST, S.COST FROM SESSIONS S WHERE 1 = 1 and S.STATUS = 'OPEN' ORDER BY S.STARTS_AT ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT S.ID, S.TITLE, S.STARTS_AT AS startsAt, S.LOCATION, S.TOPIC, S.TYPE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SESSION_APPLICATIONS A WHERE A.SESSION_ID = S.ID and a.status = 'CONFIRMED' ) AS attendanceCount, S.CAPACITY, S.STATUS, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, S.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, S.HOST, S.COST FROM SESSIONS S WHERE 1 = 1 and S.STATUS = 'CLOSED' ORDER BY S.STARTS_AT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT S.ID, S.STARTS_AT AS startsAt, S.LOCATION, S.TOPIC, S.TYPE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SESSION_APPLICATIONS A WHERE 1 = 1 and A.SESSION_ID = S.ID and A.status = 'CONFIRMED' ) AS attendanceCount, S.CAPACITY, S.STATUS, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, S.CREATED_BY AS createdBy, S.HOST as hostId, S.TITLE, S.COST FROM SESSIONS S WHERE S.ID = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_applications ( session_id, user_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT(session_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO sessions ( starts_at, location, topic, type, capacity, created_at, updated_at, title, host ) VALUES ( #{startsAt}, #{location}, #{topic}, #{type}, #{capacity}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{title}, #{hostId} )

INSERT INTO SESSION_APPLICATIONS ( SESSION_ID, USER_ID, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES
( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
ON CONFLICT (SESSION_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET STATUS = EXCLUDED.STATUS, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id AS sessionId, user_id AS userId, status, applied_at AS appliedAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM session_applications WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY applied_at ASC

select u.id as userId , a.ID as applicationId , u.NAME as name , u.NICKNAME as nickname , u.EMAIL as email , a.STATUS as applicationStatus , a.CREATED_AT as createdAt from SESSION_APPLICATIONS a inner join users u on a.USER_ID = u.ID where 1 = 1 and a.SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} and a.STATUS = 'CONFIRMED'
SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE status = 'OPEN' AND starts_at + INTERVAL '90 minutes' <= #{now}::timestamp

SELECT s.id AS sessionId, s.title AS title, s.starts_at AS startsAt, s.location AS location, COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id) AS appliedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN sa.id END) AS attendedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status = 'ABSENT' THEN sa.id END) AS noShowCount, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') THEN sa.id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT sa.id), 0) ) AS attendanceRate, s.topic AS topicTitle FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN session_applications sa ON sa.session_id = s.id AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' LEFT JOIN attendances a ON a.session_id = sa.session_id AND a.user_id = sa.user_id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId} AND s.status = 'CLOSED' GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.starts_at, s.location, s.topic;

SELECT a.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.nickname AS nickname FROM attendances a INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.session_id = #{sessionId} AND a.status IN ('ATTENDED', 'LATE') ORDER BY u.name ASC;

SELECT t.round_no as roundNo, t.table_no AS tableNo, t.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.nickname AS nickname FROM table_assignments t INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY t.table_no ASC, u.name ASC;

SELECT sa.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.nickname AS nickname FROM session_applications sa INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = sa.user_id WHERE sa.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sa.status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT sa.id AS id, sa.session_id AS sessionId, sa.user_id AS userId, sa.status AS status, sa.created_at AS appliedAt, sa.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM SESSION_APPLICATIONS sa WHERE sa.id = #{applicationId}

SELECT s.id AS sessionId, s.title AS title, s.starts_at AS startsAt, s.location AS location, st.main_topic AS topicTitle FROM sessions s LEFT JOIN session_topics st ON st.session_id = s.id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SESSIONS SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 and ID = #{sessionId} AND STATUS = 'OPEN'
